title: Grok Build 0.1 now available on Vercel AI Gateway
summary: Grok Build 0.1 now available on Vercel AI Gateway
whyItMatters: Grok Build 0.1 is now available on Vercel AI Gateway . This is a beta coding model trained for agentic coding, currently in early access, and powers the Grok Build CLI app. Reasoning effort is not configurable, and there is no non-reasoning mode. To use Grok Build 0.1, set model to xai/grok-build-0.1 in the AI SDK . AI Gateway provides a unified API for cal…
